name: debug
description: Live debugging pipeline: hypothesize → instrument → analyze
headline: Debug an issue that's hard to reproduce — 3 agents narrow it down

agents.name: hypothesizer
agents.description: Generate ranked hypotheses about what's wrong
agents.prompt:
ISSUE: {{task}}

Without fixing anything, generate 5 ranked hypotheses about the cause. For each:
- What you'd observe if it's true
- What test/log/probe would confirm or rule it out
- Probability (gut feel, %)

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Hypothesis 1 (most likely): ...
## Hypothesis 2: ...
...

## Recommended next probe
(the cheapest hypothesis to confirm)

agents.name: instrumenter
agents.prompt:
ISSUE: {{task}}

HYPOTHESES:
{{hypothesizer}}

Add minimal instrumentation to test the top 2 hypotheses. Use the project's existing logger if possible.

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Instrumentation added
- file:line — what it logs

## How to trigger
## What to look for

agents.name: analyst
agents.prompt:
ISSUE: {{task}}

HYPOTHESES:
{{hypothesizer}}

INSTRUMENTATION:
{{instrumenter}}

Run the trigger, observe logs/output, narrow down which hypothesis is correct.

If you can't reproduce, say so. Do NOT speculate further than the evidence supports.

Write to {{outputPath}}:

## Confirmed cause (if any)
## Ruled out
## Still possible
## Recommended next step

Then REVERT the instrumentation (or note that the user should).
